title: RBI Imposes Penalties on Six NBFCs for KYC, Governance, and Asset Classification Violations
description: <cite index="51-1,51-2">RBI imposed a penalty of ₹6.20 lakh on Avail Financial Services Limited through an order dated July 10, 2026, for violating RBI's governance and credit/investment concentration norms.</cite> <cite index="24-12,24-13">RBI also imposed a penalty of ₹2.70 lakh on Dhani Loans and Services Limited through an order dated July 15, 2026, for failing to classify certain loan accounts as Non-Performing Assets (NPAs), which violated RBI's asset classification guidelines.</cite>
